response.justification: Candidate is an experienced senior full-stack engineer with broad polyglot experience and some early C/C++ exposure at National Instruments (2007-2008), but the role demands 8 years of C++ as a hard minimum and the resume shows roughly 6 months of C++ work nearly two decades ago. Primary recent stacks are TypeScript/Node.js and DLang, with no evidence of large-scale cloud compute platform leadership, distributed systems at the required scale, or formal tech-lead mentoring of cloud/DevOps engineers.
strengths: Long tenure with senior/staff titles and founder-level ownership of a distributed geo-data platform
Strong testing, TDD, and craftsmanship background with workshops and mentoring experience
Polyglot systems exposure including low-latency services handling millions of req/sec at Sociomantic
concerns: C++ experience is minimal and ~18 years stale — far short of the 8-year minimum
No demonstrated production cloud compute platform or large-scale distributed infra ownership at hyperscaler scope
No explicit technical-leadership role mentoring cloud/DevOps engineers as required by preferred quals
